moneyprinterRequest.video_subject: French Rubber Base for South African nail technicians
moneyprinterRequest.video_script_prompt: Create a short, practical, salon-focused script for French Rubber Base. Audience: South African nail technicians. Pain point: French and colour work can look messy when the base is uneven. CTA: Shop Crystal Clawz French Rubber Base. Approved benefits: smooth base; cleaner colour application; salon-ready base; useful for French sets; supports overlay work where the product page supports it. Blocked claims: medical or health claims; guaranteed perfect results; invented testimonials; unverified lab results; works for every client. Do not invent testimonials, medical claims, lab results, or guaranteed outcomes.

reviewStatus.notes: Draft bundle prepared. Human reviewer must approve for Postiz draft upload only.

postizHandoff.caption: Smooth base for cleaner salon work. Shop Crystal Clawz French Rubber Base.

review.notes: Preview package only. Do not upload or schedule until review status is approved.
